feature_list.test_description: Verify the core supports direct I2C normal-mode operation at 100 Kbps.
test_steps: Configure the core for 100 Kbps I2C operation.
Initiate an I2C transfer using SCL and SDA.
Measure the resulting bus speed.
expected_results: The core operates at 100 Kbps normal-mode.
SCL and SDA activity is consistent with a valid I2C transfer at the configured speed.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core can directly support 100 Kbps normal-mode I2C operation, where implemented.
feature_list.requirement_text:
The interface defines 3 transmission speeds:
- Normal: 100Kbps
Only 100Kbps and 400Kbps modes are supported directly.

feature_list.test_description: Verify the core supports I2C fast-mode operation at 400 Kbps.
test_steps: Configure the core for 400 Kbps I2C operation.
Initiate an I2C transfer using SCL and SDA.
Measure the resulting bus speed.
expected_results: The core operates at 400 Kbps fast-mode.
SCL and SDA activity is consistent with a valid I2C transfer at the configured speed.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core can support 400 Kbps fast-mode I2C operation, where correct hardware is included.
feature_list.requirement_text:
The interface defines 3 transmission speeds:
- Fast: 400Kbps
Only 100Kbps and 400Kbps modes are supported directly.

feature_list.test_description: Verify the core exposes a WISHBONE RevB.3 compliant WISHBONE Classic interface signal set.
test_steps: Inspect the core interface signals.
Confirm presence of wb_clk_i, wb_rst_i, wb_adr_i, wb_dat_i, wb_dat_o, wb_we_i, wb_stb_i, wb_cyc_i, wb_ack_o, and wb_inta_o.
expected_results: All listed WISHBONE Classic interface signals are exposed by the core.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core shall implement a WISHBONE RevB.3 compliant WISHBONE Classic interface.
feature_list.requirement_text: The core features a WISHBONE RevB.3 compliant WISHBONE Classic interface.

feature_list.test_description: Verify each WISHBONE access completes in two clock cycles.
test_steps: Start a WISHBONE access by asserting wb_cyc_i and wb_stb_i on a clock edge.
Count wb_clk_i cycles until wb_ack_o is asserted.
Repeat for a representative access.
expected_results: wb_ack_o is asserted on the second clock cycle of each access.
Each access takes two clock cycles.
feature_list.requirement_description: Each WISHBONE access must take two clock cycles.

feature_list.test_description: Verify asynchronous reset operates when configured as active high.
test_steps: Configure ARST_LVL to active high.
Drive arst_i high.
Observe reset behavior of the core.
expected_results: The core reset is asserted when arst_i is high under active-high configuration.
feature_list.requirement_description: The asynchronous reset level is configurable as active high or active low.
feature_list.requirement_text: The asynchronous reset level can be set to either active high (1’b1) or active low (1’b0)

feature_list.test_description: Verify asynchronous reset operates when configured as active low.
test_steps: Configure ARST_LVL to active low.
Drive arst_i low.
Observe reset behavior of the core.
expected_results: The core reset is asserted when arst_i is low under active-low configuration.
feature_list.requirement_description: The asynchronous reset level is configurable as active high or active low.
feature_list.requirement_text: The asynchronous reset level can be set to either active high (1’b1) or active low (1’b0)

feature_list.test_description: Verify the core exposes the SCL pad input, output, and output-enable signals.
test_steps: Inspect the external connection ports of the core.
Confirm presence of scl_pad_i, scl_pad_o, and scl_pad_oe.
expected_results: The SCL pad input, output, and output-enable signals are exposed by the core.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core must expose SCL and SDA pad input, output, and output-enable signals for external open-drain bus connection.
feature_list.requirement_text:
scl_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Clock line input
scl_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output
scl_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output enable
sda_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Data line input
sda_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output
sda_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output enable

feature_list.test_description: Verify the core exposes the SDA pad input, output, and output-enable signals.
test_steps: Inspect the external connection ports of the core.
Confirm presence of sda_pad_i, sda_pad_o, and sda_pad_oe.
expected_results: The SDA pad input, output, and output-enable signals are exposed by the core.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core must expose SCL and SDA pad input, output, and output-enable signals for external open-drain bus connection.
feature_list.requirement_text:
scl_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Clock line input
scl_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output
scl_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output enable
sda_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Data line input
sda_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output
sda_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output enable
